title: Self-Balancing Two-Wheel Robot
description: Inverted-pendulum robot maintaining balance using IMU-based tilt measurement and cascaded PID driving differential DC motors.
objective: Balance autonomously on flat surfaces; BLE app control; ±5° tilt tolerance.
constraints: Height ≤ 300 mm; ≤ 1.5 kg; battery ≥ 30 min; max speed ≥ 0.5 m/s.
supporting_fact_titles: IMU (Inertial Measurement Unit) for Robot Navigation
design_element_titles: Cascaded PID Rate and Attitude Controller
TB6612FNG Dual H-Bridge PWM Motor Drive

element_usage_notes.Cascaded PID Rate and Attitude Controlle: Inner balance loop at 200 Hz; outer speed loop at 50 Hz.
